headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Consolidated Edison (ED) Stronger Q1 Earnings And A US$2 Billion ATM Offering
summary: In early May 2026, Consolidated Edison filed a US$2.00 billion at-the-market follow-on common stock offering and reported first-quarter 2026 results showing higher revenue, net income, and earnings per share than a year earlier. Together with ongoing infrastructure investments and stronger demand trends, these developments have coincided with an improved analyst outlook and relative outperformance within the Utilities sector. Next, we’ll explore how this combination of stronger earnings and...
